one_time_description: TransCanada Pipelines one-time payment of $1,200,000 with no comparative prior year amount
economic_notes: Band has investments in Kenpesq't Limited Partnership (99.99%), Kenpesq't GP Ltd. (100%), Kinbasket Development Corporation, Kinbasket Water & Sewer Company Ltd., Kinbasket Property Development Corporation, and Kenpesq't Holdings Ltd. Land lease and sub-leased land rights are significant assets. Water settlement received of $504,723.
notes: Audit is qualified on multiple grounds: (1) financial information for certain nation business entities not available; (2) $600,000 advance to Columbia River Property from unrelated third party may not be collectable; (3) sub-leased land rights carried at fair value not in accordance with PSAS; (4) deferred revenue includes $2,353,776 appraisal increase on sub-leased land rights not in accordance with PSAS. Prior period adjustment restated 2022 figures. Four entities fully consolidated: Kinbasket Development Corporation, Kinbasket Water & Sewer Company Ltd., Kinbasket Property Development Corporation, Kenpesq't Holdings Ltd. Two GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: Kenpesq't Limited Partnership and Kenpesq't GP Ltd. No schedule of remuneration provided. OSR calculated as total revenue minus ISC, CMHC, FNHA, BC Gaming Revenue Sharing, Province of BC, and other government transfers.
